name: dograh
description: Set up, run, and troubleshoot a self-hosted Dograh voice-AI deployment.

interface.shortDescription: Set up, run, and troubleshoot Dograh deployments.
interface.longDescription: Dograh helps Codex set up, develop on, and troubleshoot self-hosted Dograh voice-AI deployments by orienting to the user's environment, reading Dograh's current docs and scripts, and running diagnostics without hard-coding setup steps.
defaultPrompt: Use $dograh:dograh-setup to set up a Docker dev stack where I can edit Dograh code.
Use $dograh:dograh-setup to deploy Dograh on my Ubuntu VPS over HTTPS.
Use $dograh:dograh-setup to diagnose a failing Dograh health check.
